changelog: Fix: UI freeze on AnyReel/DramaBox during long downloads (Worker.run was running on the GUI thread)
Fix: UI freeze after DramaBox download when Auto-Zip was enabled (now runs on a background thread)
Fix: AnyReel progress bar stuck at 50% (per-episode 0-100 collided with overall idx/total)
Fix: Progress bar swing across DramaBox, FlickReels, ShortTV, MyDrama, ShortsDrama (now monotonic 0-100)
Fix: GUI lag during long batches (cached log fonts/colors, capped log to 1500 lines)
Fix: Up-to-8s freeze when finishing a download (poster cache was sync on GUI thread; now async)
Add: AnyReel byte-progress status updates every 2s + 90s stall watchdog
Add: Threading regression tests pinning the off-GUI invariants for Worker, Zip, and poster cache
Build: 33/33 tests pass, all touched modules compile clean
